title: Zymobiomics Magbead Nucleic Acid Purification - v2
author: Opentrons

steps.title: original samples (up to 24 samples...
steps.instruction: original samples (up to 24 samples aligned down columns and then across rows) **MID-PROTOCOL SETUP** for 4x6 2ml screwcap tube aluminum block (slot 2): * tubes A1-C

steps.title: molecular grade water tubes (1 tube...
steps.instruction: molecular grade water tubes (1 tube for each 8 samples); *note-- the user is prompted to replace these tubes midway through the protocol* 12-channel reagent reservoir (slot 4): * channel

steps.title: magwash 2 (1 channel each for...
steps.instruction: magwash 2 (1 channel each for 2x washes) waste reservoir (slot 11): * *Note-- the reservoir is programmed as an Agilent 290ml single-channel reservoir, but the user can replace this with any reservoir of choice for containing the liquid waste throughout the protocol by calibrating to the top of the reservoir before the run.*

steps.title: Input the respective mount sides for...
steps.instruction: Input the respective mount sides for your P300 single- ad multi-channel pipettes, the number of samples, and the volume of beads (in ul), the bead separation time (in minutes), and whether you are using a temperature module for drying.

steps.title: Upload your protocol into the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
